description: Machine-readable recommendation rules for BobKat StackScore v1. Triggers fire on worst-tier answers (scoreValue = 0) unless triggerAnswers specifies otherwise.

consolidationGroups.title: Microsoft 365 Security Hardening
consolidationGroups.description: Address identity and access gaps across Microsoft 365 including MFA for users and administrators.
consolidationGroups.businessImpact: User and administrative accounts remain vulnerable to credential theft, phishing, and unauthorized access until identity controls are standardized.

consolidationGroups.title: Comprehensive Backup & Recovery Program
consolidationGroups.description: Establish reliable backup coverage, offsite storage, ransomware protection, and validation testing.
consolidationGroups.businessImpact: Data loss may be permanent and recovery unproven without a complete backup strategy covering servers, workstations, and cloud data.

consolidationGroups.title: Managed Endpoint Security Program
consolidationGroups.description: Deploy and monitor endpoint protection with centralized management across all devices.
consolidationGroups.businessImpact: Unprotected or unmonitored endpoints increase malware, ransomware, and unauthorized software risk across the organization.

consolidationGroups.title: Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery Planning
consolidationGroups.description: Develop, document, and test disaster recovery procedures including remote work readiness.
consolidationGroups.businessImpact: The business lacks validated recovery procedures and may experience extended downtime during disruptions.

consolidationGroups.title: IT Documentation Package
consolidationGroups.description: Create and maintain essential IT documentation including network diagrams, procedures, and vendor contacts.
consolidationGroups.businessImpact: Incomplete documentation slows incident response, onboarding, and recovery efforts.

consolidationGroups.title: Strategic Technology Planning
consolidationGroups.description: Establish technology roadmap, annual budgeting, and leadership reporting cadence.
consolidationGroups.businessImpact: Technology investments become reactive without strategic planning and executive visibility.

templates.title: Enable Multi-Factor Authentication for All Users
templates.description: Deploy MFA across all Microsoft 365 user accounts to prevent unauthorized access from compromised credentials.
templates.businessImpact: User accounts can be compromised through phishing, password reuse, or credential theft.

templates.title: Enforce MFA for Administrative Accounts
templates.description: Require MFA on all privileged and administrative accounts without exception.
templates.businessImpact: Administrative account compromise can lead to full environment takeover.

templates.title: Deploy Centrally Managed Endpoint Protection
templates.description: Install and standardize endpoint protection on all company devices.
templates.businessImpact: Devices are vulnerable to malware, ransomware, and unauthorized software execution.

templates.title: Implement Endpoint Protection Monitoring
templates.description: Actively monitor endpoint protection alerts and remediation status.
templates.businessImpact: Threats may go undetected without active monitoring and response.

templates.title: Implement Centralized Patch Management
templates.description: Manage operating system updates through a centralized platform.
templates.businessImpact: Unpatched systems remain vulnerable to known security exploits.

templates.title: Establish Timely Critical Patch Process
templates.description: Ensure critical security patches are applied within 30 days of release.
templates.businessImpact: Delayed patching leaves systems exposed to actively exploited vulnerabilities.

templates.title: Deploy Advanced Email Filtering
templates.description: Implement advanced email security beyond basic spam filtering.
templates.businessImpact: Phishing and malicious email attachments pose a direct path to account compromise.

templates.title: Conduct Security Awareness Training
templates.description: Provide annual phishing and security awareness training for all employees.
templates.businessImpact: Employees are the first line of defense against social engineering attacks.

templates.title: Implement Quarterly Account Reviews
templates.description: Review user accounts quarterly to remove stale access and enforce least privilege.
templates.businessImpact: Stale accounts and excessive permissions increase insider and external threat risk.

templates.title: Formalize Employee Offboarding Process
templates.description: Disable accounts and revoke access immediately upon employee termination.
templates.businessImpact: Former employees with active accounts pose unauthorized access risk.

templates.title: Deploy Automated Server Backup Solution
templates.description: Implement automated, monitored backups for all servers.
templates.businessImpact: Data loss may be permanent following hardware failure, ransomware, or accidental deletion.

templates.title: Back Up Critical Workstations
templates.description: Extend backup coverage to business-critical workstations.
templates.businessImpact: Local data on workstations may be unrecoverable after device failure or ransomware.

templates.title: Implement Microsoft 365 Backup Platform
templates.description: Back up Microsoft 365 email, OneDrive, and SharePoint data independently of Microsoft retention.
templates.businessImpact: Deleted emails and files may not be recoverable without third-party backup.

templates.title: Implement Quarterly Backup Validation Testing
templates.description: Test backup restores at least quarterly to verify recoverability.
templates.businessImpact: Successful backups do not guarantee successful recovery.

templates.title: Perform Full Restore Validation
templates.description: Conduct a full restore test to validate end-to-end recovery capability.
templates.businessImpact: Recovery time and success are unknown without validated restore procedures.

templates.title: Implement Offsite Backup Storage
templates.description: Store backups offsite or in isolated cloud storage separate from production.
templates.businessImpact: Onsite-only backups may be destroyed alongside production during disasters or ransomware.

templates.title: Protect Backups from Ransomware
templates.description: Implement immutable or air-gapped backup protection against ransomware and mass deletion.
templates.businessImpact: Ransomware can encrypt or delete backups stored alongside production systems.

templates.title: Monitor and Review Backup Failures
templates.description: Implement automated backup failure alerting and regular review.
templates.businessImpact: Silent backup failures leave the organization believing data is protected when it is not.

templates.title: Perform Firewall Replacement Assessment
templates.description: Evaluate replacement options for aging firewall hardware and licensing.
templates.businessImpact: Aging infrastructure may lack security updates, vendor support, and modern protections.

templates.title: Plan Network Switch Refresh
templates.description: Replace or upgrade aging network switches to improve reliability and performance.
templates.businessImpact: Aging switches increase outage risk and may lack modern management capabilities.

templates.title: Improve Wireless Coverage
templates.description: Assess and remediate wireless coverage gaps across the facility.
templates.businessImpact: Poor wireless coverage reduces employee productivity and may drive unsafe workarounds.

templates.title: Deploy UPS Protection for Critical Systems
templates.description: Install uninterruptible power supplies for servers, network equipment, and critical infrastructure.
templates.businessImpact: Unexpected power interruptions may damage equipment and cause outages.

templates.title: Evaluate Secondary Internet Connection
templates.description: Assess failover or secondary ISP options for business continuity.
templates.businessImpact: A single ISP outage can halt operations.

templates.title: Implement Network Equipment Monitoring
templates.description: Monitor network devices for availability, performance, and faults.
templates.businessImpact: Network issues may go undetected until they cause user-facing outages.

templates.title: Implement Guest Network Segmentation
templates.description: Separate guest Wi-Fi from business networks to reduce lateral movement risk.
templates.businessImpact: Shared networks allow guest devices to access business resources.

templates.title: Create Centralized Asset Inventory
templates.description: Document all company-owned devices with ownership, location, and configuration details.
templates.businessImpact: Devices cannot be effectively tracked, managed, or secured without a complete inventory.

templates.title: Deploy Centralized Endpoint Management
templates.description: Manage all endpoints through a unified management platform.
templates.businessImpact: Unmanaged devices create security blind spots and increase support costs.

templates.title: Enable Remote Support Capability
templates.description: Deploy tools that allow secure remote troubleshooting and support.
templates.businessImpact: Issues take longer to resolve without remote access, increasing downtime.

templates.title: Track Device Warranties
templates.description: Maintain warranty status for all company devices to plan replacements proactively.
templates.businessImpact: Unexpected repair costs and delays occur when warranty status is unknown.

templates.title: Define Hardware Replacement Cycle
templates.description: Establish a formal hardware refresh schedule based on device age and role.
templates.businessImpact: Aging hardware increases failure rates and support costs.

templates.title: Replace Unsupported Operating Systems
templates.description: Upgrade or replace devices running unsupported operating systems.
templates.businessImpact: Unsupported devices no longer receive security updates and are actively targeted.

templates.title: Implement Device Health Monitoring
templates.description: Monitor device health metrics including disk space, performance, and uptime.
templates.businessImpact: Hardware failures and performance issues go undetected until they impact users.

templates.title: Create Network Documentation Package
templates.description: Develop a current network diagram and supporting infrastructure documentation.
templates.businessImpact: Troubleshooting and recovery efforts are slowed during outages.

templates.title: Document Vendor Support Contacts
templates.description: Maintain current vendor contacts, support numbers, and contract details.
templates.businessImpact: Response times increase during critical incidents when vendor information is unavailable.

templates.title: Deploy Secure Credential Storage
templates.description: Store administrative credentials in an encrypted password management vault.
templates.businessImpact: Shared or unsecured credentials increase breach risk and create single points of failure.

templates.title: Document Critical IT Procedures
templates.description: Create standard operating procedures for common and emergency IT tasks.
templates.businessImpact: Undocumented procedures create dependency on specific individuals and slow recovery.

templates.title: Formalize Employee IT Onboarding
templates.description: Document IT onboarding steps including account creation, device provisioning, and training.
templates.businessImpact: Inconsistent onboarding creates security gaps and delays new employee productivity.

templates.title: Formalize Employee IT Offboarding
templates.description: Document IT offboarding steps including access revocation and device recovery.
templates.businessImpact: Informal offboarding leaves accounts and data exposed after employee departure.

templates.title: Track Software Licensing
templates.description: Maintain an inventory of software licenses, renewals, and compliance status.
templates.businessImpact: Untracked licensing leads to compliance risk and unexpected renewal costs.

templates.title: Develop Disaster Recovery Plan
templates.description: Create a documented disaster recovery plan with roles, procedures, and recovery priorities.
templates.businessImpact: The business lacks a documented recovery process following a disaster.

templates.title: Conduct Disaster Recovery Testing
templates.description: Test the disaster recovery plan annually to validate assumptions and procedures.
templates.businessImpact: Recovery assumptions have not been validated.

templates.title: Implement Remote Work Strategy
templates.description: Enable employees to work remotely during facility outages.
templates.businessImpact: Operations may stop entirely during facility outages.

templates.title: Document Emergency Contact Procedures
templates.description: Maintain current emergency contacts for staff, vendors, and critical services.
templates.businessImpact: Delayed communication during emergencies extends recovery time.

templates.title: Protect Equipment from Environmental Hazards
templates.description: Assess and mitigate flooding, HVAC, and environmental risks for critical equipment.
templates.businessImpact: Environmental damage can destroy infrastructure and cause extended outages.

templates.title: Evaluate Generator Power for Critical Systems
templates.description: Assess generator capacity for critical systems during extended power outages.
templates.businessImpact: Extended power outages halt operations without backup power.

templates.title: Develop Three-Year Technology Roadmap
templates.description: Create a documented technology roadmap aligned with business goals.
templates.businessImpact: Technology investments become reactive rather than strategic.

templates.title: Create Annual Technology Budget
templates.description: Establish an annual technology budget planning process.
templates.businessImpact: Unexpected expenses become more likely without planned technology spending.

templates.title: Establish Leadership Technology Reviews
templates.description: Review technology risks and initiatives with leadership at least annually.
templates.businessImpact: Leadership lacks visibility into technology risks affecting the business.

templates.title: Plan Proactive Hardware Refreshes
templates.description: Schedule hardware refreshes before end-of-life to avoid emergency replacements.
templates.businessImpact: Reactive hardware replacement increases cost and downtime.

templates.title: Provide Regular Technology Status Reports
templates.description: Deliver monthly technology status reports to leadership.
templates.businessImpact: Leadership cannot make informed decisions without regular technology reporting.

steps: On assessment completion, evaluate each response against template triggerAnswers
If alsoTriggerOnPartial is true, also evaluate middle-tier answers (scoreValue > 0 and < weight)
Create Assessment Recommendation records from matching templates
Evaluate consolidationGroups: if 2+ member templates triggered, replace individuals with consolidated recommendation
Sort by priority then estimatedImpactPoints descending
